violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Residential fridge at 49F.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Fish in sink at 55F. Thaw under cold running water.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Fried rice at 125F.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
